title: Sales Support Specialist
description:
Singleron Biotechnologies is an innovative molecular technologies company dedicated to bringing groundbreaking single-cell analysis techniques to researchers through kits, instruments, and services. The company was incorporated in January 2018 and currently has offices and laboratories in Germany, the US, Singapore, and China. 

Singleron’s Singapore branch is seeking motivated, ambitious talent to help grow our presence in Singapore.

Sales Support Specialist  

We are seeking a motivated in-house Sales Support Specialist to join our sales team at Singleron Biotechnologies. In this role, you will be responsible for driving sales growth through direct outreach and support of the sales team.   

The key responsibilities include: 

  • Identify and prospect potential customers in the genomics and life sciences sectors  

  • Manage sales pipelines and maintain accurate records in CRM systems  

  • Collaborate with product, marketing, and technical teams to address customer requirements  

  • Prepare sales proposals and quotations  

  • Track market trends and provide competitive intelligence to the team  

Position Requirements: 

  • Bachelor's degree in Biology, Life Sciences, or related field  

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills  

  • Self-motivated with a results-driven mindset  

  • Excellent organizational and time management skills  

  • Preferably with a background or knowledge in genomics, sequencing, or single-cell analysis 

  • Fluency in Korean and/or Japanese to support the sales team in liaising with regional clients and partners will be considered an added advantage. 

What We Offer  

  • Competitive base salary with performance-based commission  

  • Comprehensive benefits package  

  • Professional development and training opportunities  

  • Collaborative and innovative work environment  

  • Opportunity to work with cutting-edge biotechnology

postedCompany.description: Singleron Biotechnologies Pte. Ltd. is a biomedical company in Singapore, Germany, the US and China that is pioneering the use of single cell multi-omics to improve clinical research and precision medicine. Using a combination of innovative single cell assays and AI-assisted bioinformatics, Singleron provides a comprehensive sample to answer service that enables users to phenotype cells using standard protein markers and gain a deeper understanding of cell activity based upon their gene expression profiles.
postedCompany.name: SINGLERON BIOTECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
